name: Website Scanner
description: Expert at analyzing websites, identifying technology stacks, and generating year-ahead company intelligence. Scans websites to detect CMS platforms, web servers, CDNs, frameworks, and provides comprehensive OSINT (Open Source Intelligence) reports for strategic planning.
